goal: Show per-plan token cost and duration in the console project detail page

items.title: Console per-plan cost table
items.body:
- [ ] Console project detail shows a per-plan cost table on the detail page.
      Aggregate the existing detail history by plan id, summing iterations, total tokens, and durationMs.
      Render plan id, iterations, tokens, duration, and landed/pending status above the iteration log.
      Tests included for the console detail data/rendering path with multiple plans and ignored unscoped iterations.
items.rationale: Minimal path: the console detail API already sends recent history with usage, durationMs, planId, and merged, so this can be a small frontend aggregation plus focused console tests without introducing new report plumbing or schema churn.

items.title: Shared per-plan console accounting
items.body:
- [ ] Console project detail per-plan accounting: extract report-style plan history aggregation into a shared module that returns plan id, title, iterations, total tokens, durationMs, and landed/pending status.
      Use that model from `nightcrew report` and `src/console/data.ts` so the project detail JSON exposes a stable per-plan metrics field instead of page-only aggregation.
      Render a per-plan table on the console project detail page with token totals and human-readable duration while preserving the existing summary, proposals, token curve, and history table.
      Tests included for aggregation, console detail JSON, and the HTML rendering path.
items.rationale: The architecture-first path is to establish one durable per-plan accounting model backed by history records, then have both CLI reporting and console data consume it. That avoids duplicating token and duration math in the frontend and creates a stable API field for future console views.

items.title: Console Plan Cost/Duration Table
items.body:
- [ ] Console project detail per-plan cost/duration: extract a shared
      plan metrics projection over full history that groups plan-scoped
      iterations by plan id, sums total tokens and durationMs, resolves
      titles across active/paused/completed plans, and marks landed/pending.
      Expose the metrics from the project detail API and render a table with
      plan, iterations, tokens, duration, and status while keeping the existing
      summary, token curve, proposals, and iteration history intact.
      Tests included.
items.rationale: Risk-first: the main correctness risk is misleading totals from ad hoc frontend math or the console's capped recent-history view. A shared, tested history projection gives the console accurate per-plan token and duration data and reduces drift with the existing report breakdown before adding the UI.
